Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*********************************************************************************

 Monadic 1-cells

 In this file, we define monadic adjunctions in arbitrary bicategories. Suppose,
 that we have an adjunction in some bicategory with Eilenberg-Moore objects. This
 adjunction gives rise to a monad, and we can take the Eilenberg-Moore object of
 this particular monad.

 To define monadic adjunctions, we take a similar approach as in category theory.
 So, we first define the comparison 1-cell whose target is the Eilenberg-Moore
 object of the monad generated by the adjunction in consideration. After that, we
 say that the adjunction is monadic if the comparison 1-cell is an adjoint
 equivalence.

 Note that we only define the representable definition of monadic 1-cells for
 locally univalent bicategories. That is because then we can reuse the fact that
 the bicategory of univalent categories has Eilenberg-Moore objects. In addition,
 in the representable definition, we do not assume that the involved bicategory
 has Eilenberg-Moore objects, while we need to do so for the other definition.

 Contents:
 1. Comparison cell
 2. Monadic adjunctions
 3. Representable definition of monadic 1-cells

 *********************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Categories.EilenbergMoore.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.FullyFaithful.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.CompositesAndInverses.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monads.Monads.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.AdjointUnique.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Properties.AdjunctionsRepresentable.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Examples.MonadInclusion.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.Examples.MonadsLax.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Monads.Examples.AdjunctionToMonad.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Monads.Examples.ToMonadInCat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Monads.Examples.MonadsInBicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.EilenbergMooreObjects.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Examples.BicatOfUnivCatsLimits.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section Monadic.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (HB : bicat_has_em B)
          {x y : B}
          (l : adjunction x y).

  Let r : y --> x := left_adjoint_right_adjoint l.
  Let η : id₁ _ ==> l · r := left_adjoint_unit l.
  Let ε : r · l ==> id₁ _ := left_adjoint_counit l.

  Let m : mnd B := mnd_from_adjunction l.

  Let e : em_cone m := pr1 (HB m).
  Let He : has_em_ump _ e := pr2 (HB m).

  (**
   1. Comparison cell
   *)
  
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
((((lassociator r (l · r) (l · r)
    • (lassociator r l r ▹ l · r)) • ((ε ▹ r) ▹ l · r))
  • (lunitor r ▹ l · r)) • lassociator r l r)
• (ε ▹ r) =
(((((r ◃ rassociator l r (l · r))
    • (r ◃ (l ◃ lassociator r l r)))
   • (r ◃ (l ◃ (ε ▹ r)))) • (r ◃ (l ◃ lunitor r)))
 • lassociator r l r) • (ε ▹ r)

  
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
((((lassociator r (l · r) (l · r)
    • (lassociator r l r ▹ l · r)) • ((ε ▹ r) ▹ l · r))
  • (lunitor r ▹ l · r)) • lassociator r l r)
• (ε ▹ r) =
(((((r ◃ rassociator l r (l · r))
    • (r ◃ (l ◃ lassociator r l r)))
   • (r ◃ (l ◃ (ε ▹ r)))) • (r ◃ (l ◃ lunitor r)))
 • lassociator r l r) • (ε ▹ r)

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(((((r ◃ rassociator l r (l · r))
    • (r ◃ (l ◃ lassociator r l r)))
   • (r ◃ (l ◃ (ε ▹ r)))) • (r ◃ (l ◃ lunitor r)))
 • lassociator r l r) • (ε ▹ r) =
((((lassociator r (l · r) (l · r)
    • (lassociator r l r ▹ l · r)) • ((ε ▹ r) ▹ l · r))
  • (lunitor r ▹ l · r)) • lassociator r l r)
• (ε ▹ r)

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(((((r ◃ rassociator l r (l · r))
    • (r ◃ (l ◃ lassociator r l r)))
   • (r ◃ (l ◃ (ε ▹ r)))) • (r ◃ (l ◃ lunitor r)))
 • lassociator r l r) • (ε ▹ r) = ?b
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
?b =
((((lassociator r (l · r) (l · r)
    • (lassociator r l r ▹ l · r)) • ((ε ▹ r) ▹ l · r))
  • (lunitor r ▹ l · r)) • lassociator r l r)
• (ε ▹ r)

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(((((r ◃ rassociator l r (l · r))
    • (r ◃ (l ◃ lassociator r l r)))
   • (r ◃ (l ◃ (ε ▹ r)))) • (r ◃ (l ◃ lunitor r)))
 • lassociator r l r) • (ε ▹ r) = ?b

      
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(r ◃ rassociator l r (l · r))
• ((r ◃ (l ◃ lassociator r l r))
   • ((r ◃ (l ◃ (ε ▹ r)))
      • ((r ◃ (l ◃ lunitor r))
         • (lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r))))) = ?b

      
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(r ◃ (l ◃ lassociator r l r))
• ((r ◃ (l ◃ (ε ▹ r)))
   • ((r ◃ (l ◃ lunitor r))
      • (lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)))) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
((((r ◃ (l ◃ lassociator r l r)) • (r ◃ (l ◃ (ε ▹ r))))
  • (r ◃ (l ◃ lunitor r))) • lassociator r l r)
• (ε ▹ r) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
((r
  ◃ (l ◃ ((lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r)))
 • lassociator r l r) • (ε ▹ r) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(lassociator r l (r · (l · r))
 • (r · l
    ◃ ((lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r)))
• (ε ▹ r) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
lassociator r l (r · (l · r))
• ((r · l
    ◃ (lassociator r l r • ((ε ▹ r) • lunitor r)))
   • (ε ▹ r)) = ?t2

      
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
lassociator r l (r · (l · r))
• ((ε ▹ r · (l · r))
   • (id₁ y
      ◃ (lassociator r l r • ((ε ▹ r) • lunitor r)))) =
?t2

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(r ◃ rassociator l r (l · r))
• (lassociator r l (r · (l · r))
   • ((ε ▹ r · (l · r))
      • (id₁ y
         ◃ (lassociator r l r • ((ε ▹ r) • lunitor r))))) =
((((lassociator r (l · r) (l · r)
    • (lassociator r l r ▹ l · r)) • ((ε ▹ r) ▹ l · r))
  • (lunitor r ▹ l · r)) • lassociator r l r)
• (ε ▹ r)

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(r ◃ rassociator l r (l · r))
• (lassociator r l (r · (l · r))
   • ((ε ▹ r · (l · r))
      • (id₁ y
         ◃ (lassociator r l r • ((ε ▹ r) • lunitor r))))) =
lassociator r (l · r) (l · r)
• ((lassociator r l r ▹ l · r)
   • (((ε ▹ r) ▹ l · r)
      • ((lunitor r ▹ l · r)
         • (lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)))))

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
lassociator r l (r · (l · r))
• ((ε ▹ r · (l · r))
   • (id₁ y
      ◃ (lassociator r l r • ((ε ▹ r) • lunitor r)))) =
(r ◃ lassociator l r (l · r))
• (lassociator r (l · r) (l · r)
   • ((lassociator r l r ▹ l · r)
      • (((ε ▹ r) ▹ l · r)
         • ((lunitor r ▹ l · r)
            • (lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r))))))

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(lassociator r l (r · (l · r)) • (ε ▹ r · (l · r)))
• (id₁ y ◃ ((lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r)) =
((((((r ◃ lassociator l r (l · r))
     • lassociator r (l · r) (l · r))
    • (lassociator r l r ▹ l · r)) • ((ε ▹ r) ▹ l · r))
  • (lunitor r ▹ l · r)) • lassociator r l r)
• (ε ▹ r)

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(lassociator r l (r · (l · r)) • (ε ▹ r · (l · r)))
• (id₁ y ◃ ((lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r)) =
((((lassociator r l (r · (l · r))
    • lassociator (r · l) r (l · r))
   • ((ε ▹ r) ▹ l · r)) • (lunitor r ▹ l · r))
 • lassociator r l r) • (ε ▹ r)

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
lassociator r l (r · (l · r))
• ((ε ▹ r · (l · r))
   • (id₁ y
      ◃ (lassociator r l r • ((ε ▹ r) • lunitor r)))) =
lassociator r l (r · (l · r))
• (lassociator (r · l) r (l · r)
   • (((ε ▹ r) ▹ l · r)
      • ((lunitor r ▹ l · r)
         • (lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)))))

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(ε ▹ r · (l · r))
• (id₁ y ◃ (lassociator r l r • ((ε ▹ r) • lunitor r))) =
lassociator (r · l) r (l · r)
• (((ε ▹ r) ▹ l · r)
   • ((lunitor r ▹ l · r)
      • (lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r))))

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(ε ▹ r · (l · r))
• (id₁ y ◃ ((lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r)) =
(((lassociator (r · l) r (l · r) • ((ε ▹ r) ▹ l · r))
  • (lunitor r ▹ l · r)) • lassociator r l r)
• (ε ▹ r)

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(ε ▹ r · (l · r))
• (id₁ y ◃ ((lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r)) =
((((ε ▹ r · (l · r)) • lassociator (id₁ y) r (l · r))
  • (lunitor r ▹ l · r)) • lassociator r l r)
• (ε ▹ r)

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(ε ▹ r · (l · r))
• (id₁ y ◃ (lassociator r l r • ((ε ▹ r) • lunitor r))) =
(ε ▹ r · (l · r))
• (lassociator (id₁ y) r (l · r)
   • ((lunitor r ▹ l · r)
      • (lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r))))

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
id₁ y ◃ (lassociator r l r • ((ε ▹ r) • lunitor r)) =
lassociator (id₁ y) r (l · r)
• ((lunitor r ▹ l · r) • (lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)))

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
id₁ y ◃ ((lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r) =
((lassociator (id₁ y) r (l · r) • (lunitor r ▹ l · r))
 • lassociator r l r) • (ε ▹ r)

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
id₁ y ◃ ((lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)) • lunitor r) =
(lunitor (r · (l · r)) • lassociator r l r) • (ε ▹ r)

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
id₁ y ◃ (lassociator r l r • ((ε ▹ r) • lunitor r)) =
lunitor (r · (l · r)) • (lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r))

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(is_invertible_2cell_lunitor (r · (l · r))) ^-1
• (id₁ y ◃ (lassociator r l r • ((ε ▹ r) • lunitor r))) =
lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)

HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y

B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r

linvunitor ?f =
(rinvunitor ?f • (?f ◃ unit_of_mnd m)) • ?fm
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧

((lassociator ?f (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • (?fm ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor ?f ▹ endo_of_mnd m)) • ?fm =
(?f ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • ?fm

B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧

e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
r · endo_of_mnd m ==> id₁ y · r
 exact (lassociator _ _ _ • (ε ▹ r)).
    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
linvunitor r =
(rinvunitor r • (r ◃ unit_of_mnd m))
• (lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r))
 abstract
        (refine (!(id2_left _) @ _) ;
         use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; [ is_iso | ] ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         exact (!(internal_triangle2 l))).
    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
((lassociator r (endo_of_mnd m) (endo_of_mnd m)
  • ((lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)) ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
 • (lunitor r ▹ endo_of_mnd m))
• (lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r)) =
(r ◃ mult_of_mnd m) • (lassociator r l r • (ε ▹ r))
 abstract
        (cbn ;
         rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp, <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         exact comparison_mor_cone_mult).
  Defined.

  Definition comparison_mor
    : y --> e
    := em_ump_1_mor _ He comparison_mor_cone.

  Definition comparison_mor_cell
    : em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)
      ==>
      r
    := cell_of_mnd_cell (em_ump_1_inv2cell _ He comparison_mor_cone).

  
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
invertible_2cell
  (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone
   · mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)) r

HB: bicat_has_em B

B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y

 exact (from_invertible_mnd_2cell
               (em_ump_1_inv2cell _ He comparison_mor_cone)).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
((((rassociator
      (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)
      (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e))
      (endo_of_mnd m)
    • (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone
       ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e)))
   • lassociator
       (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)
       (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B e))
       (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)))
  • ((runitor (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)
      • linvunitor
          (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone))
     ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)))
 • rassociator (id₁ comparison_mor_cone)
     (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)
     (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)))
• (id₁ comparison_mor_cone ◃ comparison_mor_cell) =
((comparison_mor_cell ▹ l · r) • lassociator r l r)
• (ε ▹ r)

HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y

 ▹ endo_of_mnd m)

    (mor_of_em_cone m comparison_mor_cone)

  (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e))
  (endo_of_mnd m)
• ((em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone
    ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e))

        (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)

B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
p:= mnd_cell_endo
  (em_ump_1_inv2cell m He comparison_mor_cone): mnd_mor_endo
  (# (mnd_incl B)
     (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)
   · mor_of_em_cone m e)
• (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B comparison_mor_cone)
   ◃ cell_of_mnd_cell
       (em_ump_1_inv2cell m He comparison_mor_cone)) =
(cell_of_mnd_cell
   (em_ump_1_inv2cell m He comparison_mor_cone)
 ▹ endo_of_mnd m)
• mnd_mor_endo
    (mor_of_em_cone m comparison_mor_cone)
rassociator (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)
  (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e))
  (endo_of_mnd m)
• ((em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone
    ◃ mnd_mor_endo (mor_of_em_cone m e))
   • (lassociator
        (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)
        (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B e))
        (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e))
      • (((runitor
             (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)
           • linvunitor
               (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone))
          ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e))
         • (rassociator (id₁ comparison_mor_cone)
              (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)
              (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e))
            • (id₁ comparison_mor_cone
               ◃ comparison_mor_cell))))) =
mnd_mor_endo
  (# (mnd_incl B)

• (id₁ comparison_mor_cone ◃ comparison_mor_cell) = 
?b

      
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
lassociator (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)
  (endo_of_mnd (mnd_incl B e))
  (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e))
• (runitor (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)
   ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)) = ?y'

      apply runitor_rwhisker.

He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
(((em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone
   ◃ lunitor (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)))

       (em_ump_1_mor m He comparison_mor_cone)
     ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)))

     (mor_of_mnd_mor (mor_of_em_cone m e)))

 • comparison_mor_cell) • linvunitor r

    apply linvunitor_assoc.
  Qed.

  (**
   2. Monadic adjunctions
   *)
  Definition is_monadic
    : UU
    := left_adjoint_equivalence comparison_mor.

  
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop is_monadic

  
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
isaprop is_monadic

    
B: bicat
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint l: B ⟦ y, x ⟧
η:= left_adjoint_unit l: id₁ x ==> l · r
ε:= left_adjoint_counit l: r · l ==> id₁ y
m:= mnd_from_adjunction l: mnd B
e:= pr1 (HB m): em_cone m
He:= pr2 (HB m): has_em_ump m e
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
is_univalent_2_1 B

    exact HB_2_1.
  Qed.
End Monadic.

(**
 3. Representable definition of monadic 1-cells
 *)
Definition is_monadic_repr
           {B : bicat}
           (HB_2_1 : is_univalent_2_1 B)
           {x y : B}
           (l : adjunction x y)
  : UU
  := ∏ (w : B),
     is_monadic
       has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
       (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat _ l w HB_2_1).


B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
isaprop (is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l)


B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
isaprop (is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l)

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
t: B
isofhlevel 1
  ((λ t : B,
    is_monadic has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
      (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l t HB_2_1)) t)

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
t: B
is_univalent_2_1 bicat_of_univ_cats

  exact univalent_cat_is_univalent_2_1.
Defined.

Section MonadicReprWeqMonadic.
  Context {B : bicat}
          (HB_2_1 : is_univalent_2_1 B)
          (HB : bicat_has_em B)
          {x y : B}
          (l : adjunction x y).

  Section DiagramOfMonadicRepr.
    Context (w : B).

    Let M : Monad (hom w x)
      := mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
           (mnd_from_adjunction
              (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)).

    Let M' : Monad (hom w x)
      := mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w.

    Let F : hom w y
            ⟶
            eilenberg_moore_cat _
      := comparison_mor
           has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
           (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1).

    Let G : hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
      := post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l).

    Let H : hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
            ⟶
            eilenberg_moore_cat M'
      := is_em_universal_em_cone_functor _ (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w.

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
eilenberg_moore_cat M

⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z · l
· left_adjoint_right_adjoint l ==>
ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z

        exact (rassociator _ _ _ • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z).
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
η M (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z)
· (rassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z) l
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z
   :
   hom w x ⟦ M (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z),
   ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z ⟧) =
id₁ (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z)
 abstract
          (refine (_ @ eilenberg_moore_ob_unit z) ; cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           do 2 apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
           apply id2_left).
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
μ M (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z)
· (rassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z) l
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z
   :
   hom w x ⟦ M (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z),
   ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z ⟧) =
# M
  (rassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z) l
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z
   :
   hom w x ⟦ M (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z),
   ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z ⟧)
· (rassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z) l
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z
   :
   hom w x ⟦ M (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z),
   ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z ⟧)
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite !id2_left, id2_right ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
           rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           pose (eilenberg_moore_ob_mult z) as p ;
           cbn in p ;
           rewrite <- p ; clear p ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
           rewrite rassociator_rassociator ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           rewrite !lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite lwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           apply maponpaths_2 ;
           rewrite <- rassociator_rassociator ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite !lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
           rewrite id2_left ;
           rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite rwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite lunitor_lwhisker ;
           apply idpath).
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z₁, z₂: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: eilenberg_moore_cat M' ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
eilenberg_moore_cat M
⟦ is_monadic_connecting_functor_ob z₁,
is_monadic_connecting_functor_ob z₂ ⟧

    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad

 exact (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor f).
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z₁, z₂: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: eilenberg_moore_cat M' ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
pr21 (is_monadic_connecting_functor_ob z₁)
· mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor f =
# M (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor f)
· pr21 (is_monadic_connecting_functor_ob z₂)
 abstract
          (cbn ;
           rewrite !vassocr ;
           rewrite rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
           rewrite !vassocl ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           exact (eq_of_eilenberg_moore_mor f)).
    Defined.

B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
∏ a b : eilenberg_moore_cat M',
eilenberg_moore_cat M' ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ eilenberg_moore_cat M ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'

 exact is_monadic_connecting_functor_ob.
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B

  (mnd_from_adjunction

  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y

    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad

          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w

  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
∏ a b : eilenberg_moore_cat M',
eilenberg_moore_cat M' ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ eilenberg_moore_cat M
  ⟦ is_monadic_connecting_functor_ob a,
  is_monadic_connecting_functor_ob b ⟧
 exact @is_monadic_connecting_functor_mor.
    Defined.

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B

  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
is_functor is_monadic_connecting_functor_data

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
is_functor is_monadic_connecting_functor_data

z₁, z₂, z₃: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: eilenberg_moore_cat M' ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat M' ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
# is_monadic_connecting_functor_data (f · g) =
# is_monadic_connecting_functor_data f
· # is_monadic_connecting_functor_data g

        
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z₁, z₂, z₃: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: eilenberg_moore_cat M' ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
g: eilenberg_moore_cat M' ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
pr11 f • pr11 g =
mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor f
• mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor g

        apply idpath.
    Qed.

    Defined.

    Section IsMonadicEso.
      Context (z : eilenberg_moore_cat M).

          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z: eilenberg_moore_cat M
η M' ?x · ?f = id₁ ?x
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z: eilenberg_moore_cat M
μ M' ?x · ?f = # M' ?f · ?f

 exact (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z).

B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B

⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad

  (mnd_from_adjunction l)

⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z: eilenberg_moore_cat M
ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z
· (l · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l) ==>
ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z

          exact (lassociator _ _ _ • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z).
        
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z: eilenberg_moore_cat M
η M' (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z)
· (lassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z) l
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z
   :
   hom w x ⟦ M' (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z),
   ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z ⟧) =
id₁ (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z)
 abstract
            (refine (_ @ eilenberg_moore_ob_unit z) ; cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             apply idpath).
        
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z: eilenberg_moore_cat M
μ M' (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z)
· (lassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z) l
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z
   :
   hom w x ⟦ M' (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z),
   ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z ⟧) =
# M'
  (lassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z) l
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z
   :
   hom w x ⟦ M' (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z),
   ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z ⟧)
· (lassociator (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z) l
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • mor_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z
   :
   hom w x ⟦ M' (ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z),
   ob_of_eilenberg_moore_ob z ⟧)
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite <- rwhisker_rwhisker ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             pose (eilenberg_moore_ob_mult z) as p ;
             cbn in p ;
             rewrite !id2_left, !id2_right in p ;
             rewrite <- p ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             apply maponpaths_2 ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
             rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite rassociator_rassociator ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • (_ • z)) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite !lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite !(maponpaths (λ z, _ • z) (vassocr _ _ _)) ;
             rewrite lwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
             rewrite id2_right ;
             use vcomp_move_L_pM ; [ is_iso | ] ; cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite <- rassociator_rassociator ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             rewrite lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
             rewrite id2_left ;
             rewrite <- !rwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite <- !lwhisker_vcomp ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite rwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             apply maponpaths ;
             rewrite lunitor_lwhisker ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z: eilenberg_moore_cat M
eilenberg_moore_cat M
⟦ is_monadic_connecting_functor_ob
    is_monadic_connecting_functor_fiber, z ⟧

 apply identity.
        
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B

  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))

z: eilenberg_moore_cat M
pr21 (is_monadic_connecting_functor_ob
        is_monadic_connecting_functor_fiber)
· id₁ (pr11 z) = # M (id₁ (pr11 z)) · pr21 z
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
             rewrite !id2_rwhisker ;
             rewrite !id2_left, id2_right ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.

is_z_isomorphism
  is_monadic_connecting_functor_fiber_mor

        
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z: eilenberg_moore_cat M
is_z_isomorphism
  (pr11 is_monadic_connecting_functor_fiber_mor)

        apply is_z_isomorphism_identity.
      Defined.
    End IsMonadicEso.

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
essentially_surjective is_monadic_connecting_functor

B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z: eilenberg_moore_cat M
(λ a : eilenberg_moore_cat M',
 z_iso (is_monadic_connecting_functor a) z)
  (is_monadic_connecting_functor_fiber z)
 exact (is_monadic_connecting_functor_z_iso z).
    Defined.

    Section IsMonadicFull.
      Context {z₁ z₂ : eilenberg_moore_cat M'}
              (f : is_monadic_connecting_functor z₁
                   -->
                   is_monadic_connecting_functor z₂).

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z₁, z₂: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: eilenberg_moore_cat M
⟦ is_monadic_connecting_functor z₁,
is_monadic_connecting_functor z₂ ⟧
eilenberg_moore_cat M' ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

hom w x ⟦ pr11 z₁, pr11 z₂ ⟧
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B

  (mnd_from_adjunction

  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))

  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z₁, z₂: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: eilenberg_moore_cat M
⟦ is_monadic_connecting_functor z₁,
is_monadic_connecting_functor z₂ ⟧
pr21 z₁ · ?f = # M' ?f · pr21 z₂

        
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)

  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad

          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))

  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z₁, z₂: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: eilenberg_moore_cat M
⟦ is_monadic_connecting_functor z₁,
is_monadic_connecting_functor z₂ ⟧
hom w x ⟦ pr11 z₁, pr11 z₂ ⟧
 exact (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor f).
        
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z₁, z₂: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: eilenberg_moore_cat M
⟦ is_monadic_connecting_functor z₁,
is_monadic_connecting_functor z₂ ⟧
pr21 z₁ · mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor f =
# M' (mor_of_eilenberg_moore_mor f) · pr21 z₂
 abstract
            (cbn ;
             use (vcomp_lcancel (rassociator _ _ _)) ; [ is_iso | ] ;
             rewrite !vassocr ;
             refine (eq_of_eilenberg_moore_mor f @ _) ;
             cbn ;
             rewrite <- rwhisker_rwhisker_alt ;
             rewrite !vassocl ;
             apply idpath).
      Defined.
    End IsMonadicFull.

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
full is_monadic_connecting_functor

B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))

  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z₁, z₂: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: eilenberg_moore_cat M
⟦ is_monadic_connecting_functor z₁,
is_monadic_connecting_functor z₂ ⟧
∥ hfiber
    (λ f : eilenberg_moore_cat M' ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧,
     # is_monadic_connecting_functor f) f ∥

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z₁, z₂: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: eilenberg_moore_cat M
⟦ is_monadic_connecting_functor z₁,
is_monadic_connecting_functor z₂ ⟧
hfiber
  (λ f : eilenberg_moore_cat M' ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧,
   # is_monadic_connecting_functor f) f

HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B

    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad

          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))

  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'

f: eilenberg_moore_cat M
⟦ is_monadic_connecting_functor z₁,
is_monadic_connecting_functor z₂ ⟧
# is_monadic_connecting_functor
  (is_monadic_connecting_functor_fiber_of_mor f) = f

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)

F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w

G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))

  (mnd_from_adjunction l)

⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
z₁, z₂: eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: eilenberg_moore_cat M
⟦ is_monadic_connecting_functor z₁,
is_monadic_connecting_functor z₂ ⟧
pr11 (# is_monadic_connecting_functor
        (is_monadic_connecting_functor_fiber_of_mor f)) =
pr11 f

      apply idpath.
    Defined.

        apply homset_property.

g: eilenberg_moore_cat M
⟦ is_monadic_connecting_functor z₁,
is_monadic_connecting_functor z₂ ⟧
f₁, f₂: hfiber
  (λ f : eilenberg_moore_cat M' ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧,
   # is_monadic_connecting_functor f) g
pr111 f₁ = pr111 f₂

      exact (maponpaths (λ z, pr11 z) (pr2 f₁ @ !(pr2 f₂))).
    Qed.

M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
is_univalent (eilenberg_moore_cat M')

essentially_surjective is_monadic_connecting_functor
 exact is_monadic_connecting_functor_is_eso.
    Defined.

    Section CommuteData.
      Context (f : w --> y).

      Definition is_monadic_commute_cell
        : f
          · comparison_mor HB l
          · mor_of_mnd_mor
              (mor_of_em_cone
                 (mnd_from_adjunction l)
                 (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))))
          ==>
          f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l
        := rassociator _ _ _ • (f ◃ comparison_mor_inv2cell HB l).

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
(rassociator
   (f · comparison_mor HB l
    · mor_of_mnd_mor
        (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
           (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))))) l
   (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
 • (rassociator (f · comparison_mor HB l)
      (mor_of_mnd_mor
         (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
            (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
      (endo_of_mnd (mnd_from_adjunction l))
    • (f · comparison_mor HB l
       ◃ (mnd_mor_endo
            (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
               (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))))
          • lunitor
              (mor_of_mnd_mor
                 (mor_of_em_cone
                    (mnd_from_adjunction l)
                    (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))))))
• is_monadic_commute_cell =
((is_monadic_commute_cell ▹ l)
 ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
• (id₂
     (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l · l
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • (((rassociator f (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l) l
        • (f ◃ left_adjoint_counit l)) • runitor f)
      ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))

• (rassociator f
     (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
        (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
        (comparison_mor_cone l))
     (mor_of_mnd_mor
        (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
           (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
   • (f ◃ comparison_mor_inv2cell HB l)) =
(((rassociator f
     (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
        (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
        (comparison_mor_cone l))
     (mor_of_mnd_mor

   • (f ◃ comparison_mor_inv2cell HB l)) ▹ l)
 ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
• (id₂
     (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l · l
      · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • (((rassociator f (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l) l
        • (f ◃ left_adjoint_counit l)) • runitor f)
      ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))

        
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
(em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
   (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
   (comparison_mor_cone l)
 ◃ (mnd_mor_endo
      (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
         (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))))
    • lunitor
        (mor_of_mnd_mor
           (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
              (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))))
• comparison_mor_inv2cell HB l = ?t2

        (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)

   ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)

⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
(((rassociator f
     (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
        (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
        (comparison_mor_cone l))
     (mor_of_mnd_mor
        (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
           (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
   • (f ◃ comparison_mor_inv2cell HB l)) ▹ l)
 ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
• ((rassociator f (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l) l
    • ((f ◃ left_adjoint_counit l) • runitor f))
   ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l) = ?b

▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l = ?t2

x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B

  (mnd_from_adjunction l)

⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
(((rassociator f
     (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
        (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
        (comparison_mor_cone l))
     (mor_of_mnd_mor
        (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
           (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
   • (f ◃ comparison_mor_inv2cell HB l)) ▹ l)
 ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
• ((rassociator f (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l) l
    ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • ((rassociator f
         (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l · l)
         (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
       • (f
          ◃ (left_adjoint_counit l
             ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)))
      • (f ◃ lunitor (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)))) =
rassociator
  (f · comparison_mor HB l
   · mor_of_mnd_mor
       (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
          (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))))) l
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
• (rassociator (f · comparison_mor HB l)
     (mor_of_mnd_mor
        (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
           (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
     (endo_of_mnd (mnd_from_adjunction l))
   • (rassociator f
        (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
           (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
           (comparison_mor_cone l))
        (mor_of_mnd_mor
           (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
              (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))))
         · endo_of_mnd (mnd_from_adjunction l))
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator
              (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
                 (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
                 (comparison_mor_cone l))
              (mor_of_mnd_mor
                 (mor_of_em_cone
                    (mnd_from_adjunction l)
                    (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
              (l · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))
         • ((f
             ◃ lassociator
                 (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
                    (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
                    (comparison_mor_cone l)
                  · mor_of_mnd_mor
                      (mor_of_em_cone
                         (mnd_from_adjunction l)
                         (pr1
                            (HB
                               (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
                 l (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))
            • ((f
                ◃ ((comparison_mor_cell HB l ▹ l)
                   ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))
               • ((f
                   ◃ (left_adjoint_counit l
                      ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))
                  • (f
                     ◃ lunitor
                         (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))))))))

    • (f ◃ comparison_mor_inv2cell HB l)) ▹ l)
  ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
 • (rassociator f (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l) l
    ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))
• rassociator f (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l · l)
    (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)

HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B

  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))

  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
(((rassociator
     (f · comparison_mor HB l

            (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))))

        (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)

        (mor_of_mnd_mor

   ◃ (comparison_mor_cell HB l
      ▹ l · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)) =
(((((rassociator f
       (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
          (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
          (comparison_mor_cone l))

   ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)

 • rassociator f (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l · l)
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f

  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
(((rassociator f
     (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
        (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
        (comparison_mor_cone l))
     (mor_of_mnd_mor
        (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
           (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
   • (f ◃ comparison_mor_inv2cell HB l)) ▹ l)
 ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
• (rassociator (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l) l
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • rassociator f (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
       (l · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)) = ?b
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
?b =
rassociator
  (f · comparison_mor HB l
   · mor_of_mnd_mor
       (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
          (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))))) l
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
• (rassociator (f · comparison_mor HB l)
     (mor_of_mnd_mor
        (mor_of_em_cone 
           (mnd_from_adjunction l)
           (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
     (endo_of_mnd (mnd_from_adjunction l))
   • (rassociator f
        (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
           (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
           (comparison_mor_cone l))
        (mor_of_mnd_mor
           (mor_of_em_cone 
              (mnd_from_adjunction l)
              (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))))
         · endo_of_mnd (mnd_from_adjunction l))
      • ((f
          ◃ lassociator
              (em_ump_1_mor 
                 (mnd_from_adjunction l)
                 (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
                 (comparison_mor_cone l))
              (mor_of_mnd_mor
                 (mor_of_em_cone
                    (mnd_from_adjunction l)
                    (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
              (l · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))
         • (f
            ◃ (comparison_mor_cell HB l
               ▹ l · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)))))

       (l · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)) = ?t2

           (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))))) l
   (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
 • (rassociator f
      (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
         (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
         (comparison_mor_cone l))
      (mor_of_mnd_mor
         (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
            (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
    ▹ l · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))
• rassociator f
    (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
       (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
       (comparison_mor_cone l)
     · mor_of_mnd_mor
         (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
            (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
    (l · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)

        
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
rassociator
  (f · comparison_mor HB l
   · mor_of_mnd_mor
       (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
          (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))))) l
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
• ((rassociator f
      (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
         (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
         (comparison_mor_cone l))
      (mor_of_mnd_mor
         (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
            (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
    ▹ endo_of_mnd (mnd_from_adjunction l))
   • rassociator f
       (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
          (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
          (comparison_mor_cone l)
        · mor_of_mnd_mor
            (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
               (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
       (endo_of_mnd (mnd_from_adjunction l))) =
rassociator
  (f · comparison_mor HB l
   · mor_of_mnd_mor
       (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
          (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))))) l
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
• ((rassociator f
      (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
         (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
         (comparison_mor_cone l))
      (mor_of_mnd_mor
         (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
            (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
    ▹ l · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
   • rassociator f
       (em_ump_1_mor (mnd_from_adjunction l)
          (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
          (comparison_mor_cone l)
        · mor_of_mnd_mor
            (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
               (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
       (l · left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))

        apply idpath.
      Qed.
    End CommuteData.

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
nat_trans_data
  (G ∙ (H ∙ is_monadic_connecting_functor)) F

x, y: B

⟦ (G ∙ (H ∙ is_monadic_connecting_functor)) f, F f ⟧

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B

    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad

⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: hom w y
hom w x
⟦ pr11 ((G ∙ (H ∙ is_monadic_connecting_functor)) f),
pr11 (F f) ⟧
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: hom w y
pr21 ((G ∙ (H ∙ is_monadic_connecting_functor)) f)
· ?f = # M ?f · pr21 (F f)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad

F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))

⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: hom w y
hom w x
⟦ pr11 ((G ∙ (H ∙ is_monadic_connecting_functor)) f),
pr11 (F f) ⟧
 exact (is_monadic_commute_cell f).
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B
M:= mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: hom w y
pr21 ((G ∙ (H ∙ is_monadic_connecting_functor)) f)
· is_monadic_commute_cell f =
# M (is_monadic_commute_cell f) · pr21 (F f)
 exact (is_monadic_commute_eq f).
    Defined.

⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
is_nat_trans (G ∙ (H ∙ is_monadic_connecting_functor))
  F is_monadic_commute_data

x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B

⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f₁, f₂: hom w y
τ: hom w y ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
# (G ∙ (H ∙ is_monadic_connecting_functor)) τ
· is_monadic_commute_data f₂ =
is_monadic_commute_data f₁ · # F τ

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
w: B

F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y

pr11 (# (G ∙ (H ∙ is_monadic_connecting_functor)) τ
      · is_monadic_commute_data f₂) =
pr11 (is_monadic_commute_data f₁ · # F τ)

((τ ▹ comparison_mor HB l)

• (rassociator f₂

        (comparison_mor_cone l))

• (τ ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)

  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y

    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction

H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f₁, f₂: hom w y
τ: hom w y ⟦ f₁, f₂ ⟧
((τ ▹ comparison_mor HB l)
 ▹ mor_of_mnd_mor
     (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
        (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))

        (pr2 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
        (comparison_mor_cone l))

        (mor_of_em_cone (mnd_from_adjunction l)
           (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))

        (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))

        (comparison_mor_cone l)

             (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))))
