  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad
       (mnd_from_adjunction
          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
f: hom w y
is_z_isomorphism (is_monadic_commute f)

          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w
             HB_2_1)))
G:= post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l): hom w y ⟶ hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
H:= is_em_universal_em_cone_functor
  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
HG: adj_equivalence_of_cats G
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (H ∙ is_monadic_connecting_functor)

x, y: B

w: B

  (mnd_from_adjunction
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)): Monad (hom w x)
M':= mnd_to_cat_Monad (mnd_from_adjunction l) w: Monad (hom w x)
F:= comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1): hom w y
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat
    (mnd_bicat_of_univ_cats_to_Monad

          (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w

  (mnd_from_adjunction l)
  (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l))) w: hom w (pr1 (HB (mnd_from_adjunction l)))
⟶ eilenberg_moore_cat M'
HG: adj_equivalence_of_cats G
adj_equivalence_of_cats G
 exact HG.

  End DiagramOfMonadicRepr.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
Hl: is_monadic HB l
is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
Hl: is_monadic HB l
is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
Hl: is_monadic HB l
w: B
is_monadic has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
  (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1)

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
Hl: is_monadic HB l
w: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1))

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
Hl: is_monadic HB l
w: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
Hl: is_monadic HB l
w: B
left_adjoint_equivalence (comparison_mor HB l)

    exact Hl.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
Hl: is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l
is_monadic HB l

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y

HB: bicat_has_em B

left_adjoint_equivalence_repr (comparison_mor HB l)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
Hl: is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l
w: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (post_comp w (comparison_mor HB l))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
Hl: is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l
w: B
adj_equivalence_of_cats
  (comparison_mor has_em_bicat_of_univ_cats
     (left_adjoint_to_adjunction_cat l l w HB_2_1))

    exact (adj_equiv_to_equiv_cat _ (Hl w)).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l ≃ is_monadic HB l

HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l ≃ is_monadic HB l

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y

B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
is_monadic HB l → is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
isaprop (is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l)
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
isaprop (is_monadic HB l)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l → is_monadic HB l
 exact is_monadic_repr_to_is_monadic.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
is_monadic HB l → is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l
 exact is_monadic_to_is_monadic_repr.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
isaprop (is_monadic_repr HB_2_1 l)
 apply isaprop_is_monadic_repr.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
isaprop (is_monadic HB l)
 
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
HB: bicat_has_em B
x, y: B
l: adjunction x y
is_univalent_2_1 B

      exact HB_2_1.
  Defined.
End MonadicReprWeqMonadic.
